description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a casual urban appearance, featuring long straight hair and a relaxed stance with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a short-sleeved button-up shirt with a collar, paired with shorts and slip-on shoes. Her outfit includes fingerless gloves on both hands, adding a touch of style and utility. The figure's facial features are visible, and her hair falls naturally down her back. The clothing is fitted and appropriate for warm weather, suggesting she is prepared for a leisurely walk or casual outing. The overall look is modern and suitable for a city or neighborhood environment.
description: A casually dressed adult woman with long straight hair, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, shorts, slip-on shoes, and fingerless gloves, standing with arms outstretched.
description_view_0: Front view showing facial features, button-up shirt, shorts, gloves, and shoes clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the length of the hair, and the side of the outfit.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the hair, the back of the shirt and shorts, and the stance.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, similar to the left, with visible glove and shoe details.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved button-up shirt, shorts, fingerless gloves, slip-on shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
